meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Antigravity Project Template for Your Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to use the Antigravity project template to overcome the no-portfolio barrier. A beginner-level guide using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template bridges the gap between theory and production-ready code. By leveraging AI-assisted scaffolding, you can rapidly prototype complex applications, demonstrating your ability to build, deploy, and iterate. This turns a blank resume into a showcase of high-impact technical skills that employers actually value.
content.intro:
The silence of an empty portfolio is deafening. You have the degree, the tutorials, and the ambition, but the lack of a 'real-world' project creates a barrier that feels impossible to cross. You are stuck in the infinite loop of learning without shipping, watching others land roles while your own potential remains locked behind a lack of experience.

But the game has changed. With the Antigravity project template and the precision of Claude Code, you no longer need years of experience to build sophisticated systems. You are about to bridge the gap between student and builder, turning your first project into a professional artifact that signals competence and technical fluency.

steps.title: Define Your Architecture
steps.description: Establish the foundational structure of your app using Antigravity to ensure scalability from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a modern SaaS starter template using React, Tailwind, and Supabase. Include user authentication and a clean dashboard layout.

steps.title: Build the Core Logic
steps.description: Implement the primary feature of your application by leveraging AI to generate clean, modular business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service layer for handling API requests to the Supabase database. Ensure all functions have robust error handling and type definitions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate service layer for user profile management'

steps.title: Enhance UI/UX with AI
steps.description: Transform your basic layout into a polished, high-conversion interface using intelligent design components.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Apply a professional dark-mode design system using Tailwind classes. Ensure all components are responsive and follow accessibility standards.
steps.claude_code_command: claude apply 'refactor UI components for better accessibility and mobile responsiveness'

steps.title: Implement Automated Testing
steps.description: Build credibility by demonstrating that your code is production-ready and free of regressions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Jest test suites for the core authentication and data fetcher services. Aim for 80% coverage.

steps.title: Deploy and Document
steps.description: Finalize your project by deploying to Vercel and documenting your build process for potential employers.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a professional README.md file that explains the project purpose, the stack used, and the challenges solved during development.
steps.claude_code_command: claude commit --message 'feat: finalize project documentation for portfolio'

pro_tips: Always commit your work with descriptive messages; your commit history is your 'proof of work' for recruiters.
Refactor generated code manually; understanding why the AI wrote a specific function is where the real learning happens.
Focus on one 'hero' feature that solves a specific pain point rather than building a generic CRUD app.
Use environment variables for all sensitive keys; never hardcode secrets, even in a student project.
Add a 'Lessons Learned' section to your README to show you can reflect on technical trade-offs.
content.next_steps: After completing your project, deploy it to a live URL, add a case study write-up to your personal website, and share your progress on LinkedIn to signal your new status as an active builder.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for permission to be a developer. Your first project is the only thing standing between you and your first job. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
